summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Darshan Lovely Events website. All core features working correctly including hero slideshow, menu filtering, contact form submission, WhatsApp integration, and responsive design.

design_issues.issue: WhatsApp URLs use api.whatsapp.com instead of wa.me format
design_issues.impact: URLs still work but wa.me is more standard and shorter

design_issues.issue: Contact form success/error messages not always visible to user
design_issues.impact: Form works but user feedback could be improved

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Hero slideshow animation with 3 images working smoothly
Navigation buttons scroll to correct sections
About section displays correctly with proper typography (Playfair Display + Lato)
All 6 Signature Experience cards display with proper icons and hover effects
Menu section category filtering works for all 5 categories (All, Beeda, Ice Cream, Kids Special, Traditional)
Video Showcase section displays 2 uploaded videos properly
Gallery section shows masonry layout with 8 images (1 uploaded beeda + 7 stock images)
Why Choose Us section displays all 4 value propositions
Contact section: Call buttons work for both phone numbers (9141882689, 8197204882)
Contact section: WhatsApp buttons work for both phone numbers
Contact form submission stores inquiries in MongoDB via /api/inquiries endpoint
Floating WhatsApp button at bottom-right corner works
Footer displays correctly with brand name and 2026 copyright
Responsive design works properly on mobile viewport (390x844)
All required data-testid attributes present for interactive elements (23/23 found)
Color palette adherence: Deep Saffron (#E35F26) used for primary buttons
Typography correct: Playfair Display for headings, Lato for body text
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider updating WhatsApp URL format from api.whatsapp.com to wa.me for better user experience. Improve contact form success/error message visibility by ensuring messages display consistently after form submission.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (5/5 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (18/19 major features working perfectly)
